description: A hiring manager wants to create a new job requisition for a 'Software Engineer' position in the HR system.

nodes.task_description: Gather job details from the hiring manager (title, department, job description, salary range).

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all necessary information for the new role.

nodes.task_description: Create a new job requisition in the Applicant Tracking System (ATS) using the collected details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a draft requisition in the ATS.

nodes.task_description: Submit the requisition for approval from the department head and finance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly initiates the approval workflow in the ATS.
